The Pacifier (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $113,006,880Details
International Box Office $85,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $198,006,880
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,552,694 (27.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.70 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$56,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,131 opening theaters/3,181 max. theaters, 8.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $210,852,145

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 4th, 2005 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 18th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 28th, 2005 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment, released as Pacifier, The
MPA Rating: PG for action violence, language and rude humor.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Nanny, Special Ops, Undercover, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Spyglass Entertainment, Birnbaum/Barber
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English
